raw_consumer_statement:
I applied for an American Express card while booking a XXXX flight in XX/XX/XXXX. I never received the physical card. In XX/XX/XXXX, I discovered the card had been stolen and used fraudulently for in-person purchases. I reported the fraud immediately and was told it would be investigated. 

Over the next six months, I called Amex repeatedly. Each time I was told that the fraud case was under investigation and that Amex had six months to resolve it. Today ( XX/XX/XXXXXXXX   ), I was told by an AMEX representative that nothing had been done on my case and that it should have been resolved within 30 days. I was also told that only one person was assigned the case and no one else could comment or assist. 

The fraudulent charges were all in-person transactions, not online. If the merchant had checked identification, they could have declined the fraudulent purchases right there in the place of business. 

This case has now gone completely neglected for six months. I have received no updates, no resolution, and no reversal of fraudulent charges. I am seeking CFPB assistance to compel American Express to : Immediately reverse the fraudulent charges and related interest charges Confirm no damage has been done to my credit report Explain why my case was mishandled and delayed
